boundary: Goal1090 is a non-cloud robot baseline execution runbook. It does not run the heavy baseline, does not create cloud resources, does not authorize release, does not change public wording, and does not authorize public RTX speedup claims.
goal: Goal1090 robot Embree local baseline runbook

steps.name: smoke_one_small_embree_chunk
steps.purpose: Verify local Embree/native baseline plumbing before starting the heavy 180-chunk run.

steps.name: run_one_real_chunk
steps.purpose: Run one claim-scale chunk and confirm it writes the expected chunk artifact.

steps.name: intake_after_partial_or_full_run
steps.purpose: Aggregate present chunks and report missing/invalid chunk indices without authorizing claims.

steps.name: run_remaining_chunks_when_host_is_available
steps.purpose: Complete the same-total-work non-cloud Embree baseline over all 36M pose ids.

steps.name: final_intake
steps.purpose: Produce complete aggregate evidence after all 180 chunks exist.
